title: Ensign Pulver
writer: Thomas Heggen, Joshua Logan, Peter S. Feibleman
actors: Robert Walker Jr., Burl Ives, Walter Matthau
plot: Life becomes harried after Ensign Pulver's prank. He and the captain are swept overboard during a storm, ending up on a tropical island with a group of shipwrecked nurses, dancing natives, and one very big case of appendicitis.
